channel.title: Observability :: API Management with Kong Konnect
channel.description: The third part of the workshop is dedicated to Observability, exploring: Built-in capabilities provided by Konnect Kong Data Plane plugins to integrate with external Observability infrastructures such as Dynatrace or Honeycomb.

item.title: Konnect Builtin Observability
item.description: Basically Konnect provides two main Builtin Observability services: Konnect Advanced Analytics: it is a real-time, contextual analytics platform that provides insights into API health, performance, and usage. Konnect Debugger: it provides a connected debugging experience and real-time trace-level visibility into API traffic.
